confidence_rationale: This video contains only equipment and system demonstrations with no actual trainee or expert performance of an FLS task. The peg transfer board is visible in the background of some frames, but no instruments are actively being manipulated by a performer to complete the task. No task performance data can be extracted.

video_summary: This is a product demonstration and equipment overview video for the LAPARO Medical Simulators training system. It shows the hardware configuration, control mechanisms, task board setup (particularly Task 1: Peg Transfer), and general system layout. No actual FLS task performance is visible. The video is educational/marketing material about the equipment itself, not a scored performance.
recommendation: This video cannot be scored as an FLS performance. If you have a video of an actual trainee or expert performing a task on this LAPARO system, please provide that instead.
